name: okpack-ai-research-feed-fetch
prompt: okpack-ai-research feed pull: fetch the AI-research OPML into raw/ai/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-ai-research-hf-import
prompt: Seed notable model pages from the Hugging Face hub (bounded top-N by likes). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-ai-research-hf-papers-import
prompt: Seed source/paper pages from Hugging Face Daily Papers (bounded, upvote-curated). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-ai-research-weekly-brief
prompt: Weekly AI-research brief. FIRST read wiki/HOT.md. Write only one briefing via okengine-write to briefings/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md with type, title, published and updated set to TODAY. Cover 4-6 significant developments from the last seven days. EVERY item must end with a Source: [[sources/...]] line using an existing source actually read; entity links must be supported by that cited source. Skip unsupported claims and unresolved links. Never create or update sources, entities, concepts, predictions, or findings. Practitioner-grade and terse. LOCAL-ONLY; never file_write.
